import pandas as pd


def calculate_discount(df: pd.DataFrame) -> pd.DataFrame:
    discounts = []
    for _, row in df.iterrows():
        if row["amount"] > 1000:
            discounts.append(row["amount"] * 0.1)
        elif row["amount"] > 500:
            discounts.append(row["amount"] * 0.05)
        else:
            discounts.append(0)
    df["discount"] = discounts
    return df


def compute_tax(df: pd.DataFrame) -> pd.DataFrame:
    taxes = []
    for _, row in df.iterrows():
        tax = row["price"] * row["quantity"] * 0.08
        taxes.append(tax)
    df["tax"] = taxes
    return df
